basic_details.job_title: CLW Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Staff Benefit Fund Management Committee, CLW/Chittaranjan, Ministry of Railways
basic_details.short_information: The recruitment is being conducted by the Staff Benefit Fund Management Committee (SBFMC), CLW/Chittaranjan, West Bengal, to fill the post of Homeopathic Consultant for the Homeopathic Dispensary functioning under the Staff Benefit Fund. Here is a quick overview table of the notification.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 08.07.2026 Last Date for Receipt of Application: 29.07.2026 (up to 17:00 Hrs) Tentative Date of Interview/Viva-voce: 03.08.2026 at 11:30 Hrs (venue to be communicated later)

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification PDF or contact the Welfare Section for confirmation, as no fee details have been specified.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the eligibility conditions prescribed under RBE No. 13/2014 to be considered for the post of Homeopathic Consultant. | BHMS (Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery) from a recognized Homeopathy College, registered with the State/Central Council of Homeopathy, after successful completion of internship, OR DHMS (Diploma in Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery) from a recognized Homeopathy College, registered with the State/Central Council of Homeopathy, with at least 1½ years of working experience. | The candidate should have at least 01 (one) year remaining to complete 70 years of age from the date of engagement, as per Board's Letter No. E(W)2018/ISM/8/Pt. dated 25.07.2019. The consultant shall cease to be engaged upon attaining the age of 70 years.

salary_details.details: The engaged Homeopathic Consultant will receive a consolidated monthly honorarium as per RBE No. 18/2023, applicable for a 4-hour dispensary duty schedule. | Monthly Honorarium: Rs. 37,500/- (consolidated) for 4 hours of engagement per day In case of unauthorized absence, payment shall be made on a pro-rata basis: Consolidated Pay × Number of Days Worked / 30 No Railway Accommodation, Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Transport Allowance, Pension, Provident Fund, Medical Reimbursement, Railway Pass/PTO, Bonus, or any other Railway service benefits shall be admissible. 08 days of Casual Leave will be granted during the one-year engagement period.

selection_process: The selection of candidates for the post of Homeopathic Consultant will be based on aggregate merit obtained in the following parameters:
Mere submission of an application does not guarantee a call for interview. The empanelment is provisional and subject to final verification of credentials from the concerned Boards/Institutes.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates who wish to apply for the CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant post must follow the steps below:
Navigate to Login → News & Recruitment → Recruitment
Download the application form (Annexure-I) available on the page, or collect it from the Welfare Section of the Dy. CPO(W) office
Fill the application form completely in the prescribed format
Attach self-attested copies of all required certificates
Superscribe the envelope with "APPLICATION FOR ENGAGEMENT AS HOMEOPATHIC CONSULTANT UNDER STAFF BENEFIT FUND MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE" CLW/Chittaranjan
Send the application by Speed Post/Registered Post (or any other convenient mode) to the address below, before the last date

Postal Address: Asstt. Welfare Officer & Secretary, Staff Benefit Fund Committee, Work Office Building, Chittaranjan Locomotive Works, Post: Chittaranjan, District: Paschim Burdwan (WB), PIN Code: 713331
Applications must reach the above address on or before 29.07.2026, up to 17:00 Hrs. Applications received after the due date or found incomplete in any respect shall be summarily rejected.
important_instructions: The candidate will be called for the interview/viva-voce on a date that will be advised in due course. Mere submission of an application does not confer any right to be called for an interview. The candidate must bear their own expenses for attending the interview/viva-voce. Suppression of facts or submission of false information will lead to cancellation of candidature. The SBF Committee reserves the right to cancel, modify, or postpone this notification without assigning any reason. Candidates will have to execute a declaration accepting the terms and conditions prior to engagement. The decision of the Chairman, Staff Benefit Fund Committee, shall be final and binding. The engagement shall not confer any right to regular appointment, absorption, or continuation in Railway service. The consultant shall not be treated as a Railway servant/Government employee under any circumstances. The contract may be terminated by either side by giving 14 days' notice, and the Railway Administration/SBF Committee reserves the right to terminate the engagement at any time without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by the Staff Benefit Fund Management Committee (SBFMC), Chittaranjan Locomotive Works, under the Ministry of Railways, inviting applications for engagement of one Homeopathic Consultant on a purely contractual basis. CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 PDF

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The recruitment is being conducted by the Staff Benefit Fund Management Committee (SBFMC), CLW/Chittaranjan, West Bengal, to fill the post of Homeopathic Consultant for the Homeopathic Dispensary functioning under the Staff Benefit Fund. Here is a quick overview table of the notification.

rows.details: Staff Benefit Fund Management Committee, CLW/Chittaranjan, Ministry of Railways
One year from the date of engagement

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 08.07.2026 Last Date for Receipt of Application: 29.07.2026 (up to 17:00 Hrs) Tentative Date of Interview/Viva-voce: 03.08.2026 at 11:30 Hrs (venue to be communicated later)

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: There is a single vacancy notified under this recruitment drive:

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the eligibility conditions prescribed under RBE No. 13/2014 to be considered for the post of Homeopathic Consultant. BHMS (Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery) from a recognized Homeopathy College, registered with the State/Central Council of Homeopathy, after successful completion of internship, OR DHMS (Diploma in Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery) from a recognized Homeopathy College, registered with the State/Central Council of Homeopathy, with at least 1½ years of working experience. The candidate should have at least 01 (one) year remaining to complete 70 years of age from the date of engagement, as per Board's Letter No. E(W)2018/ISM/8/Pt. dated 25.07.2019. The consultant shall cease to be engaged upon attaining the age of 70 years.

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Salary / Honorarium
content_sections.text: The engaged Homeopathic Consultant will receive a consolidated monthly honorarium as per RBE No. 18/2023, applicable for a 4-hour dispensary duty schedule. Monthly Honorarium: Rs. 37,500/- (consolidated) for 4 hours of engagement per day In case of unauthorized absence, payment shall be made on a pro-rata basis: Consolidated Pay × Number of Days Worked / 30 No Railway Accommodation, Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Transport Allowance, Pension, Provident Fund, Medical Reimbursement, Railway Pass/PTO, Bonus, or any other Railway service benefits shall be admissible. 08 days of Casual Leave will be granted during the one-year engagement period.

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification PDF or contact the Welfare Section for confirmation, as no fee details have been specified.

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Duties and Responsibilities
content_sections.text: The engaged Homeopathic Consultant shall be responsible for: Attending the Homeopathic Dispensary during prescribed hours Examining patients and prescribing treatment Maintaining OPD registers and medical records Submitting periodical reports as required by the Railway Administration/SBF Committee Performing any other work assigned in connection with the functioning of the Homeopathic Dispensary

content_sections.heading: Selection Process CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The selection of candidates for the post of Homeopathic Consultant will be based on aggregate merit obtained in the following parameters: Educational Qualification Experience Personal Interview Mere submission of an application does not guarantee a call for interview. The empanelment is provisional and subject to final verification of credentials from the concerned Boards/Institutes.

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Required Documents
content_sections.text: Applicants must submit self-attested copies of the following documents along with the application form: Educational qualification certificates BHMS/DHMS Degree certificate Registration Certificate from State/Central Homeopathic Council Proof of Date of Birth Experience certificates issued by Municipal authority (BDO/SDO, MLA/MP or equivalent authority) or by any Government organization/PSU with an annual turnover of Rs. 200 crores Aadhaar Card PAN Card Two recent passport-size photographs Any other relevant documents Original certificates must be produced at the time of the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates who wish to apply for the CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant post must follow the steps below: Visit the official website: www.clw.indianrailways.gov.in Navigate to Login → News & Recruitment → Recruitment Download the application form (Annexure-I) available on the page, or collect it from the Welfare Section of the Dy. CPO(W) office Fill the application form completely in the prescribed format Attach self-attested copies of all required certificates Superscribe the envelope with "APPLICATION FOR ENGAGEMENT AS HOMEOPATHIC CONSULTANT UNDER STAFF BENEFIT FUND MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE" CLW/Chittaranjan Send the application by Speed Post/Registered Post (or any other convenient mode) to the address below, before the last date Postal Address: Asstt. Welfare Officer & Secretary, Staff Benefit Fund Committee, Work Office Building, Chittaranjan Locomotive Works, Post: Chittaranjan, District: Paschim Burdwan (WB), PIN Code: 713331 Applications must reach the above address on or before 29.07.2026, up to 17:00 Hrs. Applications received after the due date or found incomplete in any respect shall be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The candidate will be called for the interview/viva-voce on a date that will be advised in due course. Mere submission of an application does not confer any right to be called for an interview. The candidate must bear their own expenses for attending the interview/viva-voce. Suppression of facts or submission of false information will lead to cancellation of candidature. The SBF Committee reserves the right to cancel, modify, or postpone this notification without assigning any reason. Candidates will have to execute a declaration accepting the terms and conditions prior to engagement. The decision of the Chairman, Staff Benefit Fund Committee, shall be final and binding. The engagement shall not confer any right to regular appointment, absorption, or continuation in Railway service. The consultant shall not be treated as a Railway servant/Government employee under any circumstances. The contract may be terminated by either side by giving 14 days' notice, and the Railway Administration/SBF Committee reserves the right to terminate the engagement at any time without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the CLW Chittaranjan Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by the Staff Benefit Fund Management Committee, CLW/Chittaranjan, to engage one Homeopathic Consultant purely on a contractual basis for one year.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the Homeopathic Consultant post at CLW Chittaranjan?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications is 29.07.2026, up to 17:00 Hrs.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a BHMS degree with completed internship, or a DHMS diploma with at least 1½ years of working experience, both registered with a State or Central Council of Homeopathy.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the CLW Homeopathic Consultant post?
faq.answer: The post carries a consolidated monthly honorarium of Rs. 37,500/- for four hours of dispensary duty per day, five days a week.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have at least one year remaining to complete 70 years of age from the date of engagement.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent Railway job?
faq.answer: No. This is a purely contractual engagement for one year under the Staff Benefit Fund and does not confer any right to regular appointment or Railway service benefits.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for this post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline in the prescribed format (Annexure-I), downloaded from the official CLW website, and sent by post to the Asstt. Welfare Officer & Secretary, SBF Committee, CLW/Chittaranjan, before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. When will the interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The tentative date for the interview/viva-voce is 03.08.2026 at 11:30 Hrs. The venue will be communicated in due course.
